name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Outbound Traffic
notes: This Building Block triggers when a TLS fingerprint known to be a communication from a Cobalt Strike client is detected.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Outbound Traffic on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the destination is Remote
when the flow matches TLS JA3 Hash is not N/A
when the flow matches TLS JA3 Hash is any of [72a589da586844d7f0818ce684948eea or a0e9f5d64349fb13191bc781f81f42e1 or 37f463bf4616ecd445d4a1937da06e19 or 2c14bfb3f8a2067fbc88d8345e9f97f3]
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Outbound Traffic on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the destination is Remote
AND when the flow matches TLS JA3 Hash is not N/A
AND when the flow matches TLS JA3 Hash is any of [72a589da586844d7f0818ce684948eea or a0e9f5d64349fb13191bc781f81f42e1 or 37f463bf4616ecd445d4a1937da06e19 or 2c14bfb3f8a2067fbc88d8345e9f97f3]
